name: launchagent-manager
description: Manages macOS LaunchAgents: lists and classifies plists as OpenClaw or other, prunes non-OpenClaw agents, analyzes openclaw.json gateway configuration (port, auth, token sync), verifies gateway LaunchAgent is loaded and running, and can auto-fix by loading plists and running gateway-guard ensure.
author: OpenClaw

commands.config: Analyze gateway config and verify token sync
commands.config --fix: Auto-load gateway plist and sync tokens
